overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character riding a camel along an ancient Egyptian waterfront promenade at night. The scene features moonlit canals, palm-lined paths, and historic stone architecture as the rider approaches a banner-draped archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade along ancient canal

agents.ego_description: riding a camel at a steady pace along the waterfront path, moving away from the camera's starting position

entered.detail: low stone balustrade separating the path from the canal water
calm water reflecting moonlight and building lights
tall cylindrical stone tower with lit windows across the canal
tall date palms lining the left side of the promenade
ancient stone structures with warm lantern light visible in windows
bright full moon illuminating the night sky
wide dirt and stone pathway along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit waterfront promenade in an ancient city. The character rides a camel along a palm-lined path beside a calm canal, with a tall minaret tower visible across the water. Stone buildings with warm lights line the opposite bank, and a stone railing separates the path from the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching covered stone archway with ceremonial banners

events.description: path narrows as the character approaches the stone archway with hanging banners

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride the camel toward the stone archway, maintaining steady forward motion

entered.detail: large stone arch spanning the path ahead, marking a gateway or entrance
dark fabric banners suspended across the path above the archway
small stone building with a lit doorway on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: As the character rides forward, the open waterfront gives way to an approaching stone archway draped with hanging banners. The minaret tower and distant buildings fall behind as the path leads toward the covered gateway. A small lit gatehouse appears on the left, and the palm trees now line the immediate edge of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit waterfront promenade that gradually narrows into a formal stone gateway. It begins beside a calm canal where a character rides a camel past a stone railing and palm trees, with a tall minaret tower and warm lights from distant buildings reflecting across the water. As the rider moves forward, the open vista of the waterfront recedes and the distant architecture falls behind. The scene then shifts toward a looming stone archway draped with hanging banners, passing a small lit gatehouse on the left as the palm trees close in around the path. Finally, the camera leads the rider directly toward the covered gateway, transitioning from the expansive riverbank to the enclosed entrance of the city.
